title: DNA extraction for vertebrate tissues
author: Chang Li
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ssyeefw

steps.title: 1) Collect and cut muscle tissue of spotted sea bass
steps.instruction: 1) Collect and cut muscle tissue of spotted sea bass. 2) The tissue was defrosted and washed with normal saline.Cut about 0.5g tissue. normal saline Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co.

steps.title: Add STE, SDS (10%), protease K (20mg/ml) to mix
steps.instruction: Add STE, SDS (10%), protease K (20mg/ml) to mix. Heat 4-6h at 56℃, and shake in centrifuge at 500 rmp. STE Contributed by users SDS Ambion protease K New England Biolabs 06:00:00, heat Undetermined

steps.title: Add the same volume of Phenol
steps.instruction: Add the same volume of Phenol : Chloroform : Isoamylol (

steps.title: and mix by gentle inversion for...
steps.instruction: and mix by gentle inversion for 3-5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and then transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube.

steps.title: Add the same volume of Chloroform
steps.instruction: Add the same volume of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24 :

steps.title: and mix by gently inverting for 3-5min at room temperature
steps.instruction: and mix by gently inverting for 3-5min at room temperature.

steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and then transfer the supermatant aqueous phase in a new tube. Phenol : Chloroform : Isoamylol (

steps.title: Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. Chloroform
steps.instruction: Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. Chloroform : Isoamylol (24 :

steps.title: Add equal volume of Isopropanol, and...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of Isopropanol, and then mix by slowy inverting.

steps.title: Incubate the tube at -20℃ for overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate the tube at -20℃ for overnight.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13600rpm for 10min at 4℃ and discard the supermatant. Isopropanol Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. Undetermined,

steps.title: Add 1ml of 70% of ethanol,...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml of 70% of ethanol, flick the centriguge tube to resuspend the pellet, wash the DNA pellet for 3-5min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 5min at 4℃, discard the ethanol
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 5min at 4℃, discard the ethanol.

steps.title: Add 1ml of 70% ethanol and mix gently
steps.instruction: Add 1ml of 70% ethanol and mix gently. Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 5min at 4℃, discard the ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 30s, discard the liquid
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000rpm for 30s, discard the liquid. Air dry the pellet for 5-10min at room temperature. 70% of ethanol Sinopharm Chemical Reagent Co. 00:05:00,

steps.title: Add RNase and 100ul of TE buffer (TE
steps.instruction: Add RNase and 100ul of TE buffer (TE : RNase = 100:1), and then dissolve the pellet at 37℃ for 30min in the Thermomixer. RNase FERMENTAS Inc. TE buffer Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher 00:30:00 Undetermined
